scripts.venv-init: cd backend && (python3 -m venv venv || python -m venv venv)
scripts.install-backend: cd backend && (venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt || venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt)
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run venv-init && npm run install-backend && npm run install-frontend
scripts.env-init: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('backend/.env')) fs.copyFileSync('backend/.env.example', 'backend/.env'); if(!fs.existsSync('frontend/.env.local')) fs.copyFileSync('frontend/.env.example', 'frontend/.env.local');"
scripts.dev: npm run env-init && concurrently --names "FastAPI,Vite,TypeScript" --prefix-colors "yellow,green,blue" "cd backend && (venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --reload || venv\Scripts\python -m uvicorn main:app --reload)" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run typecheck -- --watch"
